---
title: "02. 递推增长与由一而多"
subtitle: "Recursive Growth and the Emergence of Multiplicity"
date: 2026-04-10
order: 2
categories: [synthesis, cultural, omega]
description: "Cross-text synthesis essay tracing `fibonacci_cardinality_recurrence` across 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本."
---

**主定理核 / Primary Lean Anchor:** `fibonacci_cardinality_recurrence`  
**覆盖文本 / Works:** 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本

{{< include articles/synthesis_02_fibonacci_growth_recurrence.md >}}

---

[Back to Synthesis Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
